properties.evidence: go test ./... covers proxy/WebRTC policy, managed extra arg collision, profile lock, dry-run command generation, and wrapper/browser package behavior.
python3 -m unittest tests.test_detector_harness covers target listing, matrix planning, proxy-preflight prerequisite JSON, validation, sanitization rejection, operational timeout, and KG JSONL edges.

python3 -m unittest tests.test_package_runtime covers platform plan support for linux-x64, macos-arm64, and windows-x64; Linux runtime sidecar packaging; macOS .app bundle layout preservation/rejection; Windows portable Chromium exe/DLL/pak/bin/locale packaging; checksums; non-placeholder SPDX-2.3-style SBOM metadata; file hashes/sizes; and source/patchset provenance hashes.

BrowseForge commit 5dc2749 dispatches browseforge-chromium through the Chromium launcher and writes a profile-scoped native stealth persona config with persona_id_hash and origin_salt_key, passed with --browseforge-stealth-config plus --browseforge-stealth-mode=enabled; local dogfood evidence records GET/runtime config, profile create, session launch, RuntimeID reporting, profile isolation, and Playwright Bind connection.

source-acquisition.json records checked-out Chromium refs/tags/150.0.7871.101, Linux deps sync, Docker deps image, GN output at out/BrowseForgeLinuxDocker, and applied BrowseForge scaffold/webdriver/hardware/screen/platform/timezone/locale/user-agent/storage-quota/plugins/WebRTC/audio/canvas/WebGL/feature-parity(serial-port-connected)/fonts/process-priority/switch-propagation patches.

python3 scripts/package_linux_runtime.py --execute --release-channel alpha produced launchable dist/browseforge-runtime-chromium-v0.1.0-alpha.0-linux-x64.zip with sha256 6f2679e68e1a96639d52cfe7c8ed4cf527bbb0aa05f51643f32d92234c9b1448 and size 567877597 bytes; artifact-manifest.json/provenance.json/SBOM.json include explicit os=linux and arch=x64 target metadata; packaged runtime.manifest.json records alpha status and linux-x64 packaged=true; docker linux/amd64 packaged smoke must be rerun for the rebuilt WebShare parity artifact before release-grade detector coverage is claimed.

Live SannySoft headless/direct Docker evidence is recorded at detectors/evidence/v0.1.0-alpha.0/linux-x64/sannysoft/detrun_linux_x64_sannysoft_headless_docker_direct_20260709.json, BrowserLeaks Client Hints evidence is recorded at detectors/evidence/v0.1.0-alpha.0/linux-x64/browserleaks/detrun_linux_x64_browserleaks_client_hints_headless_docker_direct_20260709.json, Pixelscan UA-CH evidence is recorded at detectors/evidence/v0.1.0-alpha.0/linux-x64/pixelscan/detrun_linux_x64_pixelscan_uach_headless_docker_direct_20260709.json, iphey UA-CH evidence is recorded at detectors/evidence/v0.1.0-alpha.0/linux-x64/iphey/detrun_linux_x64_iphey_uach_headless_docker_direct_20260709.json, BrowserScan UA-CH evidence is recorded at detectors/evidence/v0.1.0-alpha.0/linux-x64/browserscan/detrun_linux_x64_browserscan_uach_headless_docker_direct_20260709.json, and CreepJS UA-CH evidence is recorded at detectors/evidence/v0.1.0-alpha.0/linux-x64/creepjs/detrun_linux_x64_creepjs_uach_headless_docker_direct_20260709.json. The rebuilt Linux artifact verifies navigator.webdriver=false, configured Chromium UA without HeadlessChrome, UA-CH fullVersionList with Chromium 150.0.7871.101 on SannySoft/BrowserLeaks/Pixelscan/iphey/BrowserScan/CreepJS, zh-TW languages, Asia/Taipei timezone, 1920x1080/1920x1040 screen, storage quota 8589934592 bytes, hardwareConcurrency/deviceMemory=8, Intel WebGL vendor/renderer, repeat-consistent sanitized Canvas 2D hashes, an unscored OfflineAudioContext probe, and an unscored FontFaceSet availability probe. Release-grade headed/proxy BrowserLeaks/Pixelscan/iphey/BrowserScan/CreepJS/SannySoft matrix remains required; detector-score-comparison.json records CreepJS audio headless/headed deltas and BrowserLeaks/CreepJS font glyph/metric comparison while keeping release_grade=false and explicit baseline_gaps for missing BrowserLeaks audio, Pixelscan audio/fonts, and native headed font corpus evidence.

dist/browseforge-runtime-chromium-v0.1.0-alpha.0-linux-x64.zip contains artifact-manifest.json, provenance.json, SBOM.json, runtime.manifest.json, wrapper binary, patched chrome, ICU/resources/locales/crashpad/GPU runtime sidecars; artifact/provenance/SBOM metadata carry platform linux-x64 plus os linux and arch x64; python3 -m json.tool validated JSON metadata, unzip -t validates the archive, and manifests record sha256 6f2679e68e1a96639d52cfe7c8ed4cf527bbb0aa05f51643f32d92234c9b1448 and size 567877597 bytes.
